title: Public-data multiscale immune decoupling analysis in sepsis
description: Journal-neutral code, derived supplementary tables, final figure source files, and reproducibility metadata for a public-data computational analysis of multiscale immune-state decoupling in sepsis. Version v0.1.5 synchronizes the public reproducibility record with the final Frontiers in Immunology submission package, two-author metadata, five main figures, one formal supplementary figure, source-data tables, and final QA manifests.

creators.name: Li, Xinzhuo
